title: Christensonella geckophora
taxonomy: Christensonella geckophora is a species of gecko-lizard-eating pitcher plant, and its classification falls within the family Nepenthaceae. This family is part of the larger order of carnivorous plants known as Nepenthales. The classification of Christensonella geckophora can be broken down further into the subfamily Nepenthinae, and then into the genus Christensonella. The species Christensonella geckophora is a rare and endemic species found in Borneo. It is a type of tropical pitcher plant that obtains essential nutrients by capturing and digesting small animals, such as geckos.
